case_title: BIANCA ENCINAS VS. GIUSEPPE SPINOSO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-16-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-29-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, BIANCA AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-18-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-25-2018
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-18-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-29-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALBERT LOEB BOASBERG, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-16-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-02-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. No sanctions imposed against plaintiff's counsel. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Sep-10-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court does not impose sanctions against plaintiff's counsel. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to MAR-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Continued To Jan-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to JAN-15-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-10-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
